Who We Are
About TDR Esports

TEAM DISASTER (TDR) is a Bangladesh-based Free Fire esports squad built on chaos, precision and zero mercy. Founded by TDR GHOST, the roster blends veteran rushers, a calculated sniper and a support core that never breaks formation.

Currently sitting at #3 in the regional circuit, TDR is climbing the standings one disaster at a time — and the squad is just getting started.
